title: Sign Employment Contract
description: Review and sign your digital employment contract through the HR portal.
related_policy: What is the policy regarding employment contracts and right to work checks?

title: Request IT Equipment
description: Submit the hardware request form so your laptop and accessories are ready for your first day.
related_policy: What are the rules and guidelines for using company IT equipment?

title: Submit System Access Form
description: Request access to necessary tools like email, Slack, and internal systems.
related_policy: What is the procedure for getting access to internal IT systems?

title: Meet Your Manager
description: Have a 30-minute introductory meeting with your manager to discuss your role.
related_policy: What should happen during the first day of onboarding with a manager?

title: Complete Right to Work Check
description: Bring your passport or relevant visa documentation to HR for verification.
related_policy: What is the process for completing right to work checks?

title: Set Up Your Laptop
description: Log in to your new device, configure passwords, and install essential software via the self-service portal.
related_policy: How do I report an issue with my new laptop or IT equipment?

title: Get Building Access
description: Pick up your physical access badge from the ground floor reception.
related_policy: What are the rules regarding building access badges and security?

title: Read Staff Handbook
description: Review the core company policies, including working hours, dress code, and expected conduct.
related_policy: What does the staff handbook say about working hours and dress code?

title: Set Up Payroll Details
description: Enter your bank account information and national insurance number into the payroll system.
related_policy: What is the process for submitting bank details for payroll?

title: Complete Mandatory E-Learning
description: Finish the required online training modules covering general compliance and ethics.
related_policy: What happens if an employee fails to complete mandatory training?

title: Complete Health and Safety Training
description: Undergo fundamental health and safety compliance training tailored to our office environment.
related_policy: What are the health and safety responsibilities of a new employee?

title: Complete GDPR Awareness Training
description: Ensure you understand how to safely handle and process personally identifiable information.
related_policy: What is the data protection and GDPR policy regarding personal data?

title: Schedule Probation Review
description: Book a meeting for your first major performance and probationary check-in.
related_policy: What is the standard procedure for a probation period review?

title: 1-1 Check-in with HR
description: A quick 15-minute sync with HR to ensure everything is going smoothly with your onboarding.
related_policy: How can I raise a question or concern with HR during my probation?
